overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character navigating dark underground tunnels and industrial ruins with a flashlight. The character traverses flooded caves and brick sewers with two companions before emerging into a rain-soaked industrial courtyard and entering a dark corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded cave tunnel with rocky walls

events.description: two companion characters come into view standing in the water ahead
rocky cave walls transition to brick tunnel architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water in a dark cave, flashlight illuminating the rocky path ahead

notable_agents.action: two companions standing in the water ahead, waiting for the player

entered.detail: rough stone cave walls with irregular texture
shallow water covering the cave floor, reflecting the flashlight
dark rocky ceiling with hanging roots and stalactites
scattered rocks and rubble along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a dark, flooded cave tunnel with rocky walls, using a flashlight to illuminate the path. Two companions stand ahead in the water, and the environment transitions from natural rock to brick architecture as the segment progresses.

events.description: character slows while approaching a vertical climb section at the tunnel end
water level decreases and brick walls show vegetation growth near the climb point

agents.ego_description: wading through the flooded brick tunnel following the companions

notable_agents.action: companions walking ahead through the water, approaching the climbable wall

entered.detail: aged brick walls with moss and water stains forming the tunnel sides
arched brick ceiling structure supporting the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a flooded brick sewer tunnel with arched ceilings, following companions who navigate ahead. The water level gradually decreases as they approach a vertical section with vegetation growing on the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical brick shaft and circular pipe tunnel

events.description: entering narrow circular brick pipe tunnel, transitioning from water to dry climbing
exiting the tunnel into a dimly lit area with visible rainfall

agents.ego_description: climbing up through a narrow vertical brick shaft and circular pipe tunnel

entered.detail: rounded brick tunnel opening leading upward
narrow vertical brick tunnel requiring climbing

segments.scene_description: The character climbs upward through a narrow circular brick pipe, transitioning from the flooded tunnel to a dry vertical shaft. The flashlight illuminates the rough brick texture as they ascend toward an exit showing outdoor light and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked collapsed industrial courtyard with overgrowth

events.description: rain becomes visible as character emerges into the open industrial ruin
approaching the dark entrance to an industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked industrial ruins with overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: dilapidated multi-story concrete structure with broken walls
dense green vines and plants covering the ruined structures
visible rainfall and wet surfaces throughout the scene
chain-link fence gate blocking part of the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the character enters a rain-soaked industrial courtyard with collapsed buildings and dense vegetation overgrowth. Rain falls steadily as the character navigates through debris toward a dark building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial maintenance corridor with pipes and fencing

events.description: entering dark enclosed industrial corridor, leaving the rain behind
passing close to corridor wall causing temporary narrow field of view

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark industrial corridor with metal pipes and security fencing

entered.detail: concrete walls with industrial piping and electrical conduits
large cylindrical metal pipes running along the wall and ceiling
blue metal security fencing sectioning off parts of the corridor
scattered concrete chunks and rubble on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark industrial maintenance corridor, leaving the rain behind. The space features metal ventilation pipes, security fencing, and debris scattered across the concrete floor, with the flashlight cutting through the darkness ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a flooded subterranean network into a rain-drenched industrial ruin. It begins in a dark, rocky cave tunnel where a flashlight illuminates the path toward two companions, as the natural stone walls gradually transition into arched brick sewer architecture. As the water level recedes, the camera follows the group upward through a narrow, circular brick pipe, ascending from the damp tunnels toward a glimpse of outdoor light and greenery. The scene then opens into a rain-soaked industrial courtyard filled with collapsed buildings and dense overgrowth before the character navigates through the debris toward a dark building entrance. Finally, the camera moves inside a dim maintenance corridor, leaving the rain behind to reveal a concrete space lined with metal ventilation pipes and security fencing.
